entries.final_answer: Sequential: WP01 baseline, then WP02→WP03→WP04→WP05 in priority order
options: Parallel: WP01 baseline gates all; WP02-WP05 fan out in parallel
Sequential: WP01 baseline, then WP02→WP03→WP04→WP05 in priority order
entries.question: The four fix clusters (#1301 events, #1305 next, #1304 doctrine, #1303 charter synthesizer) touch fully independent subsystems and could run in parallel lanes. Should they be implemented as parallel WPs (all starting after the baseline WP), or strictly sequentially in the stated priority order?
